decision: No local planner model improves the locked suite over deterministic Rust rules.

candidate_conclusions.granite-4.1-3b-q4_k_m: Schema-valid and repeatable, but only one of three cases passes the query-quality gate.
candidate_conclusions.nanbeige4.1-3b-q4_k_m: Produces no bounded JSON before the 400-token decode limit.
candidate_conclusions.qwen3.5-4b-q4_k_m: Ties deterministic quality but adds roughly 2.27 seconds of warm latency and a model dependency.

grammar_note: llama.cpp commit 6f4f53f rejected the full planner JSON schema in its grammar sampler; unconstrained output was therefore subjected to the strict Rust-compatible post-validation boundary and invalid output was counted as failure.
selection_rule: Nanbeige becomes the default only if it improves the locked suite without weakening completeness or determinism.
